---
title: "Monkeypox Outbreak Insights"
description: "Visualizing the data produced by the World Health Organization on the 2022 monkeypox outbreak."
image: featured.png 
categories:
  - Flexdashboard
---

```{=html}
<iframe frameborder="0" scrolling="yes" seamless="seamless" style="display:block; width:100%; height:100vh;" src="https://hossainlab.github.io/monkeypox/" title="Dengue Dashboard"></iframe>
```

```{=html}
<a href="https://hossainlab.github.io/monkeypox/" class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill me-2">Live Dashboard</a>
```
